MOVING PARTIES MAY FILE THE CROSS-COMPLAINT IN THE FORM ATTACHED TO THE MOVING PAPERS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MINI MINUTES: Appearances: HUNTER SIMS, ESQ., 510.457.3468, FOR DEFENDANT ZHI BIN CHEN; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ZHI CHEN'S and RI ZHU'S Motion For Leave Of Court To File Cross-Complaint Against City and County of San Francisco is Granted. No opposition filed. Moving parties may file the Cross-Complaint in the form attached to the moving papers. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR #5963.
